underlying_goal: Diagnose why a production IRIS PE device goes silent after sending LT/LR alarm bursts during network recovery, by comparing local test logs with production failure logs
friction_detail: User questioned whether Claude's same-connection conclusion was based on actual evidence or assumptions, prompting Claude to verify
brief_summary: User wanted to analyze SIA receiver logs to understand why a production PE device dies after LT/LR alarm bursts; Claude helped compare local vs production logs and identified key differences (same-second timing, connection behavior) but root cause remains unresolved.
